text: the quality that only pressure can produce.
wait until you discover event bubbling. your journey is just beginning.
grid changed my life. flexbox who?
just wait until you need to support a browser that doesn't like grid. enjoy it while it lasts.
Dr. Fadi deserves the world honestly.
bro really went to Turkey and came back enlightened.
Trabzon is underrated, glad you had a great time!
we are all scared with you. moral support only, i have nothing else to offer.
a semicolon took me down once. i still have PTSD.
this is the most relatable thing i have ever read on this app.
my laptop joined me in suffering. we are bonded by trauma.
group project solidarity. i feel this in my bones.
next time just put all your names and submit it alone. same result.
moving on is the correct response. no need to audit the past.
6 hours and nothing retained is criminally efficient in the wrong direction.
thank you i needed this. we will survive. probably.
together but individually panicking. as is tradition.
